helper_landscape_summary: Drinfeld center + monoidal category papers are pure math (no LLM/ML application). Multi-agent LLM literature (2501.06322 survey, 2601.08129 pressure fields, 2602.08009 ad-hoc network) uses orthogonal mechanisms (RL coordination, message passing). No category-theoretic protocol observed.
